creator: kdeguchi@sz.tokoha-u.ac.jp
text:
When the dependent packages are not installed, pkg_replace will be terminated by pkg_sort function with pkgng. I made new patch and fixed this bug.

Fix: I made new patch and fixed this bug.

Patch attached with submission follows:
How-To-Repeat: When the dependent packages are not installed, pkg_replace will be terminated by pkg_sort function with pkgng.
